name: Oral History Station
description: One of eight interactive oral history stations on the museum floor. Each station maps to a Jira ticket family and to a canonical Airtable label tracker row.
fields_json: [{"id": "stationTitle", "name": "Station Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "stationNumber", "name": "Station Number", "type": "Integer", "required": true}, {"id": "canonicalSlug", "name": "Canonical Slug", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "subtitle", "name": "Subtitle", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "labelCopy", "name": "Label Copy", "type": "Text", "required": true}, {"id": "labelStatus", "name": "Label Status", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "primaryOralHistorianName", "name": "Primary Oral Historian Name", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "primaryClipDuration", "name": "Primary Clip Duration", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "audioAssetId", "name": "Audio Asset Id", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}, {"id": "heroImageId", "name": "Hero Image Id", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}, {"id": "published", "name": "Published", "type": "Boolean", "required": true}]

name: Press Item
description: Press kit collateral including bios, photos, and lead release.
fields_json: [{"id": "title", "name": "Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "kind", "name": "Kind", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "body", "name": "Body", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "embargoUntil", "name": "Embargo Until", "type": "Date", "required": false}, {"id": "asset", "name": "Asset", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}]

name: Donor Vignette

name: Exhibition Metadata
description: Top-level exhibition metadata, one entry per active exhibition.
fields_json: [{"id": "exhibitionTitle", "name": "Exhibition Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "openingDate", "name": "Opening Date", "type": "Date", "required": true}, {"id": "closingDate", "name": "Closing Date", "type": "Date", "required": false}, {"id": "description", "name": "Description", "type": "Text", "required": false}]

description: Operational alert content surfaced on the kiosk admin dashboard.
